ui.title: Mod Documentation
ui.no-mods-content: No mods have registered any documentation.
gmcm.keybind-tooltip: The key to open the in-game mod documentation viewer. Default: F2
gmcm.show-button-tooltip: Show a clickable button in the top-left corner of the screen as an alternative to the keybind.
gmcm.accent-color-tooltip: Background fill for the selected mod in the left pane and the selected page tab. Accepts a 6-digit hex color (e.g. B14E05). Default: B14E05 (orange-brown).
gmcm.border-color-tooltip: Color of the thick border around the documentation viewing pane. Accepts a 6-digit hex color (e.g. B48C50). Default: B48C50 (golden tan).
gmcm.scrollbar-color-tooltip: Color of the scrollbar thumb. Does not affect the scroll arrow icons. Accepts a 6-digit hex color (e.g. B48C50). Default: B48C50 (golden tan).
ui.link-confirm:
Open this link in your browser?
{{url}}
